author: Non-1235
title: Bad application
content: The app is missing these essential features: smooth transition, automatic mix, and customizable song blend timing. Adding them would greatly improve the overall user experience.

author: Joseph.-.
content: جربت فد عشر تطبيقات لحد ما لگيت هذا ، ارقى مشغل صوت.  ننصح به

author: Non-1235
title: Lie
content: Deceivers—how can they claim it plays FLAC when it actually relies on the phone’s default player and doesn’t support bit-perfect audio? What’s the point of this player?
